title: what is the name of the course?

messages.content: what is the name of the course?

Based on the context provided, it seems the course is called "AML Adv Feedback". The full name given is "Material: Virtuale/CourseAMLAdv2526". However, the topic or subject of the course is Advanced Machine Learning (AML) and it relates to feedback on AML.
